reachability.note: Pod SSH port changed from 16833 to 14248 mid-check — container restarted at ~13:50 UTC

pre_restart_snapshot.note_cpu: 100% single-core — running on CPU, NOT using GPU kernels
pre_restart_snapshot.parent_cmd: cd /workspace && ls -lh train_clm_native corpus_clm_r4.txt && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/cuda-12.4/lib64:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH && ./train_clm_native 2>&1 | head -30
pre_restart_snapshot.parent_stdout_sink: head -30 — stdout after first 30 lines was silently dropped (SIGPIPE tolerated by binary)

training_metrics.note: No log file existed (stdout piped to head -30). Metrics unrecoverable. Pre-restart GPU showed 40GB VRAM reserved but 0% util — binary had allocated but never launched CUDA kernels. The process was single-core CPU-bound for all 20 minutes.

on_pod_before_restart.note: File was still growing during checks (3.32GB -> 3.51GB in ~1min) — suggests mid-write when restart hit. Filename step_5000 but step counter source unverified.

r2_uploads.note: No r4 checkpoint ever uploaded to R2 — training was not running a periodic R2 sync. Loss is TOTAL.

verdict_detail: Training process DEAD after pod container restart at ~13:50 UTC. Ephemeral workspace (volumeInGb=0) wiped all r4 artifacts. No checkpoints on R2. Pre-restart process was CPU-only (98.9% single-core, 0% GPU util) for 20 minutes despite NVL allocation — mmap byte loader plan appears to have compiled a CPU-only binary (no CUDA kernel dispatch) OR GPU kernels never launched. Paying $3.07/hr for idle H100 NVL.
root_cause_hypotheses: train_clm_native was built by composing train_clm_composed.c + runtime.c without the CUDA stride-loop kernels — 0% GPU util strongly suggests missing kernel dispatch path
stdout sunk to 'head -30' pipe means any error/warning after line 30 was silently dropped (SIGPIPE handling)
Container restart source unknown — possibly OOM (229GB RSS on checkpoint serialize), possibly host-side reschedule
No persistent volume (volumeInGb=0) + no R2 periodic sync = guaranteed data loss on any restart

next_action_recommended.priority_1_immediate: Decide: (a) restart training on this pod with fixed recipe, or (b) stop pod to halt $3.07/hr burn. Currently paying for idle H100.
priority_2_fix_recipe_before_relaunch: Pipe stdout to a real log file: ./train_clm_native 2>&1 | tee /workspace/train.log (NOT | head)
Verify CUDA kernel path: nvidia-smi dmon during launch must show >0% util within 60s
Add periodic R2 sync every N steps: rclone copy /workspace/ckpt_clm1b_r4/ r2:anima-models/clm1b/r4/ after each checkpoint
Either attach a network volume OR checkpoint-to-R2 every 500 steps, NOT only at 5000
Compare train_clm_native vs CUDA-enabled build — check if binary links against libcudart (ldd train_clm_native)
next_action_recommended.priority_3_preserve_state: Commit this report so the CPU-only-execution finding is ossified before next attempt.
next_action_recommended.cost_impact: If left RUNNING idle: ~$74/day. Kill or restart immediately.

growth_loop_status.note: Per feedback_report_includes_loop — growth_loop not checked this session; CLM r4 is primary track per project_clm_r4_mmap_plan
